Custom JSON serialization.
```python
import json
class Kisi:
    def __init__(self, ad, yas): self.ad=ad; self.yas=yas
def serialize(obj):
    if isinstance(obj, Kisi): return {"ad":obj.ad,"yas":obj.yas}
    raise TypeError
k = Kisi("Ali",25)
print(json.dumps(k, default=serialize, ensure_ascii=False))
```
